prompt: I want to test the iam-002 scenario (createaccesskey one-hop to admin). Enable it and deploy it, then show me the starting credentials so I can try it manually.

assertions.name: uses_noninteractive_flag_on_enable
assertions.description: Includes -y flag on plabs enable to skip confirmation prompt

assertions.name: includes_credentials_command
assertions.description: Includes plabs credentials iam-002 to show starting user credentials

assertions.name: no_interactive_tui
assertions.description: Does NOT suggest running bare plabs (TUI) or plabs tui

assertions.name: correct_command_sequence
assertions.description: Commands are in correct order: enable before deploy before credentials
